annotations.supportedFormats: Supported formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
annotations.tipSelectAnnotation: Move playhead to overlapping annotation section and select an item.
annotations.tipCycleForward: Use Tab to cycle through overlapping items.
annotations.imageUploadError: Please upload a JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP image file.

tutorial.title: How Trimming Works
tutorial.understanding: Understanding how to cut out unwanted parts of your video.
tutorial.descriptionP1: The Trim tool works by defining the segments you want to
tutorial.descriptionP3: Any part of the timeline that is covered by a red trim segment will be cut out when you export.
tutorial.addTrimDesc: Press T or click the scissors icon to mark a section for removal.
tutorial.adjustDesc: Drag the edges of the red region to cover exactly what you want to cut out.

feedback.title: Feedback & contact
feedback.description: Reach out directly or open an issue if something is broken or missing.

keyboardShortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.description: Quick reference for the timeline and editor controls.

nativeCaptureUnavailable.title: Nothing’s broken, but we won’t be able to render an animated cursor overlay.
nativeCaptureUnavailable.description: Your device does not support native capture. This could be for a variety of reasons we haven’t figured out yet. This doesn’t break Aureo, but it does make cursor smoothing impossible.

timeline.noTypingTelemetry: No keyboard timing data was found. Record a new video with the updated recorder first.
timeline.noTypingSegments: No sustained typing segments were found in this range.

masks.title: Mask
masks.timelineHint: Applied only across this timeline block
masks.sensitiveHint: Cover the entire timeline section where sensitive data is visible.
masks.disableHint: Keep this block on the timeline without applying it.

errors.tooLarge: Preset file is too large. Choose a file smaller than 5 MB.
errors.invalidJson: Preset file is not valid JSON.
errors.unexpected: Could not import that preset. Please check the file and try again.

reason.emptyName: Preset name is missing or empty.
reason.invalidSnapshot: Preset contents are invalid or incomplete.
reason.malformed: The file is not a valid preset.
reason.rawArray: Preset files must contain a single preset, not an array.

errors.duplicateName: A preset with that name already exists.
errors.saveFailed: Could not save that preset. Check your browser storage settings and try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Could not delete that preset. Check your browser storage settings and try again.
